sources.role: technical primary source for identity; partial source for effects
sources.codeLicense: not applicable to generated data repository
sources.gameDataStatus: GGG-derived; narrow revocable project-risk decision only
MIT does not grant rights to generated GGG data
item files identify data as GGG copyright

sources.role: mod and schema control source only
sources.gameDataStatus: extracted from maintainer's licensed local installation; no separate data grant

countingRules.effectVariant: one item category entry; one item may have multiple target categories
countingRules.technicalMod: one mods.json key; name fragments are not category proof
countingRules.visibleLine: one PoB string line; never equated with a technical Mod ID
countingRules.tier: a source-explicit tier only; augments.json exposes none
countingRules.valueRange: structured minimum/maximum only; numbers embedded in stat_text do not qualify

additionalCorruption.reason: no proven additional equipment set beyond existing 213 records

desecrated.reason: mixed map/Abyss/Unique-Heart domain; normal equipment assignment not established

mutated.reason: identified Mutated-Vaal records are predominantly Unique mechanics

enchantments.reason: no complete item-enchantment table and assignment

anointments.reason: requires recipe, item and passive-node linkage; name hit is insufficient

idComparison.socketableItemIntersection: unknown: poe2-mcp publishes schema fingerprints but no normalized SoulCores/SoulCoreStats item product
idComparison.pobIntersection: text/internal-name comparison only; no stable RePoE Mod ID relation

representativeExamples.anointmentRelation: effect marker only; no recipe/passive mapping

representativeExamples.approvalRisk: Unique name hit is not an anointment database

approvalDecision.otherSocketableIdentity: conditionally-approved for Idol, AbyssalEye and CongealedMist only
approvalDecision.existingCorruptionImplicits: conditionally-approved and already imported; no new scope/import
approvalDecision.existingCorruptionUpgrades: conditionally-approved and already imported; no new scope/import
approvalDecision.desecrated: deferred (encoded as pending in approval schema)
approvalDecision.anointments: deferred (encoded as pending in approval schema)

buildPlannerRelevance.socketableIdentityAndEffects: important for complete real equipment and build evaluation
buildPlannerRelevance.existingCorruption: already represented technically; analyzer semantics remain incomplete
buildPlannerRelevance.desecratedMutated: special/unique content; not a Version 1 import without model proof
buildPlannerRelevance.anointments: requires passive linkage and separate architecture
buildPlannerRelevance.photoMode: later needs socket count, item-position, type, stat-ID and numeric-value recognition

uncertainties: Structured numeric StatsValues and BondedStatsValues are absent from augments.json.
No lossless three-source socketable identity key exists.
Desecrated domain does not mean normal equipment Desecrated affix.
Name fragments Rune, Mutated, Enchant or Anoint are not standalone category evidence.
PoB release corresponding to the audited dev commit is unknown.
